# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.FloorAngleThreshold property

The angle in degrees from straight down withing which a ray is considered a "floor ray" and will be ignored when [`IgnoreFloor`](./IgnoreFloor.md) is enabled.

`30.0` = only nearly-vertical rays.

`60.0` = wider cone.

```csharp
public float FloorAngleThreshold { get; set; }
```
